name: Sudipta
tagline: AI developer, Python builder, Android tinkerer
bio: I'm Sudipta — a student and self-taught developer based in India. I build things at the intersection of AI, automation, and practical software that solves real problems.
My primary stack is Python. I build Android applications using Kivy and KivyMD, experiment with machine learning models, and write automation tools that make repetitive work disappear.
Outside of code, I'm fascinated by History, Geography, and how technology shapes civilisations. I document my learning journey publicly — this site is part of that effort.
I believe in building in public, learning by doing, and shipping before it's perfect.
